nasb.text: He also built the stories against the whole house, each five cubits high; and they were fastened to the house with timbers of cedar.

esv.text: He built the structure against the whole house, five cubits high, and it was joined to the house with timbers of cedar.

cnv.text: 靠著聖殿所建的廂房，每層高兩公尺兩公寸，都用香柏木的梁木與殿連接。

ccb.text: 靠着殿墙所造的厢房每一层高二点二五米，用香柏木的梁木与殿墙接连起来。
